name: io.github.rinava/phi-mcp
description: Fail-closed MCP server that redacts PII/PHI from text before it reaches an LLM — self-hosted, no egress, HIPAA-aware.

environmentVariables.name: PHI_MCP_ENGINE
environmentVariables.description: Detection engine: auto (default), regex, or presidio

environmentVariables.name: PHI_MCP_MIN_CONFIDENCE
environmentVariables.description: Trust threshold (0-1); detections below it fail closed. Default 0.5

environmentVariables.name: PHI_MCP_DETECTION_FLOOR
environmentVariables.description: Sensitivity floor (0-1); below this a signal is noise. Default 0.35
